summary: Iteration 93: Tested new dashboard sections - ULTIMI AGGIORNAMENTI (recent releases from all players), I MIEI FILM, LE MIE SERIE TV, I MIEI ANIME. All backend and frontend tests passed. Layout order verified correct: Revenue Card → ULTIMI AGGIORNAMENTI → BILANCIO FINANZIARIO, and bottom sections: I MIEI FILM → LE MIE SERIE TV → I MIEI ANIME.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard now has 4 new sections: 1) ULTIMI AGGIORNAMENTI showing 5 recent releases from ALL players with poster+title+producer name (data-testid='recent-releases-section'), placed between revenue card and financial overview; 2) I MIEI FILM (data-testid='my-films-section') with 5 posters and 'Vedi Tutti' → /films; 3) LE MIE SERIE TV (data-testid='my-series-section') with posters and 'Vedi Tutti' → /films?view=series; 4) I MIEI ANIME (data-testid='my-anime-section') with posters and 'Vedi Tutti' → /films?view=anime. User NeoMorpheus has 22 films, 4 series, 1 anime.

Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_03_ultimi_aggiornamenti_visible: PASSED - Section with 5 poster thumbnails from various players
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_04_i_miei_film_section: PASSED - Section found with 'Vedi Tutti' button and 5 poster thumbnails
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_05_le_mie_serie_tv_section: PASSED - Section found with 'Vedi Tutti' button and 4 series posters
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_06_i_miei_anime_section: PASSED - Section found with 'Vedi Tutti' button and 1 anime
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_11_layout_order_verification: PASSED - Revenue Card (y=365) → ULTIMI AGGIORNAMENTI (y=426) → BILANCIO FINANZIARIO (y=629)
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_12_bottom_sections_order: PASSED - I MIEI FILM (y=1156) → LE MIE SERIE TV (y=1327) → I MIEI ANIME (y=1499)
